introduction.consent: By visiting the website mobee.am (hereinafter referred to as the “Website”) and making purchases, you automatically consent to the collection, processing, and use of your personal data.
introduction.personalData: By "Personal Data," we mean any information that allows or may allow us to directly or indirectly identify your identity, such as your name, surname, address, email, phone number, and other data (hereinafter referred to as "Data").
introduction.definitions: In this Privacy Policy, "we," "us," and "our" refer to Website (for more information, please visit the "About Us" section), while "you," "your," and "yours" refer to any individual who visits the Website or uses our services.

collectedData.title: Collected Data
collectedData.description: We may collect the following types of information:

contact.label: Contact information
contact.description: name, surname, address, phone number, email address

dataUse.title: Use of Data
dataUse.description: Collected data is never sold or provided to third parties for marketing purposes. It is used only for the following purposes:

retention.title: Data Retention Periods
retention.description: Your personal data is stored as follows:

account.label: User account data
account.description: as long as the account is active

purchaseHistory.label: Purchase history
purchaseHistory.description: 5 years (to comply with tax and accounting regulations)

marketing.label: Marketing data
marketing.description: 2 years or until the user opts out

security.title: Data Security
security.description: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to ensure the protection of your data, including:

ssl.label: SSL encryption
ssl.description: to secure payment and personal data transmission

sharing.title: Sharing Data with Third Parties
sharing.description: We do not sell or provide your data to third parties, except for:
sharing.closing: All third parties are obligated to protect your data and cannot use it for other purposes.

copy.label: Receive a copy of your personal data

edit.label: Edit or delete your data (through our website settings or customer support)

unsubscribe.label: Opt-out of marketing emails (via the "unsubscribe" link in each email)

restrict.label: Request that your data is not processed for specific purposes, except in cases required by law

cookiesUsage.title: Cookies Usage
cookiesUsage.description: Our website uses cookies to optimize user experience. We use:

analytics.label: Analytical cookies
analytics.description: to understand user behavior and improve the website

cookiesUsage.closing: You can change your preferences at any time by managing cookies in your browser or visiting our Cookie Management Center.

changes.title: Policy Changes
changes.description: We reserve the right to make legally permitted changes to this page and the above sections. Updates will be posted on the Website.
